title: Grahana
subTitle: A Brahmin village head's son, Puttaswamy, takes the initiative to bury the corpse of a Dalit man who has died during the Hebbaramma Festival. As a result of this, he is exiled to live with the Dalits.

subTitle: Music Which Fills Everyone With Love, Songs Which Connect Us To Our True Self and The Supreme, Knowledge Which Creates Solutions.

title: Ijjodu
subTitle: Anand, a journalist, travels to a village to study more about architecture. He meets Channi, a devadasi, and while trying to explore details about her, secrets of her dark past unfold.

title: MLA
subTitle: A simple man falls for a rich landlord's daughter and in order to prove his love and marry her, he must become an MLA and succeed.

title: Mylari
subTitle: Tired of his dull village life, a young man heads to Bengaluru to make a mark. However, the bustling city overwhelms him, leading to experiences that completely change his life.

title: Premalu
subTitle: Having been rejected once, Sachin, a young man, falls for Reenu, a girl he meets during a wedding, and sets out to win her over.

title: Monsoon Raaga
subTitle: Four couples at different stages of their lives encounter love. In order to fully embrace it, they must overcome several limiting beliefs.

title: Thavarina Siri
subTitle: Muttanna bravely navigates life's challenges to provide for his family while staying true to his humanitarian heart. Despite their struggles, he selflessly takes care of others.

title: Jodi
subTitle: After receiving a random call from Shalini, Vinod falls in love with her. When his best friend also falls for her, he tries to sabotage Vinod's chances and woo her on his own.

title: Stunt Master
subTitle: Chaos erupts in a college when a student decides to end her life immediately after receiving the news of her lover's accidental death.

title: Shivayogi Sri Puttayyajja
subTitle: Puttaraj, a visually impaired child, grows up poor and passionate about classical music. Soon, he becomes a renowned vocalist and multi-instrumentalist and wins many accolades making the nation proud.

title: Navashakti Vaibhava
subTitle: A couple make vows in the name of the Almighty for the betterment of their children. When they grow up and become successful, the couple forget to fulfil their vows, causing their children to suffer.

title: Golisoda
subTitle: Four orphans living in the City Market in Bengaluru decide to make a name for themselves by opening a restaurant. However, things get out of control when some goons decide to wreak havoc.

title: O Premave
subTitle: Anjali, a young woman, falls in love with Rahul, a young man she presumes to be a millionaire. However, upon realising that he is not as wealthy, she decides to desert him.

title: Victory
subTitle: The daughter of a farmer is determined to become an international cricketer despite facing numerous challenges to make her father feel content.

title: Shakti: The Power
subTitle: Nandini and Shekhar's visit to India turns tragic when they meet his violent family. After losing Shekhar, Nandini fights to save their son and escape back home.

subTitle: A team of six people must employ an army of robots in order to fight and defeat the aliens invading and destroying the planet.

title: Jaga Mechida Huduga
subTitle: Bhavani, though rich, leads a simple life. She later meets Shivu, an orphan boy, and is pleased with his simplicity but her son is furious about this and seeks revenge on Shivu.

title: Boss
subTitle: Ram and Raj are estranged twins. When Raj learns that Ram has been mysteriously murdered, he sets out to avenge his death.

title: Bhajarangi
subTitle: A cruel god-man rules and harasses the people in a village. Jeevan, who comes to the village to learn about his ancestors, ends up bravely fighting against the him to save the villagers.

title: Max
subTitle: Inspector Arjun arrests two men for crashing into the police station. Soon, he desperately rushes to clear his name as the two are found dead.

title: Dia
subTitle: Dia believes her lover Rohit is dead after a fateful accident and falls into depression. Soon, Adi enters her life and they both fall in love but things take a turn when her past comes to haunt her.
